info.name: Al-Shaheen
info.description: Al-Shaheen News Platform — REST API v1

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Omar Writer",
  "email": "writer@example.com",
  "password": "Password@123",
  "password_confirmation": "Password@123",
  "type": "writer",
  "locale": "ar",
  "display_name": "Omar Al-Shaheen",
  "bio": "Experienced journalist with 5 years in political reporting.",
  "portfolio_link": "https://writer.example.com",
  "profile_photo": "{{profile_photo_path}}",
  "categories": [1, 2],
  "experience_level": "senior",
  "languages": ["Arabic", "English"],
  "editorial_specialties": ["Politics", "Investigative"]
}

request.description: Reader: user fields only — name, email, country, language, locale.
Contributor: user fields + bio, profile_photo, portfolio_link, categories. Upload profile image first (Uploads → Upload Profile Image).
Writer: user fields + display_name, bio, profile_photo, portfolio_link, experience_level, languages, editorial_specialties, location, social_links, media_affiliation, categories.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Omar Writer",
  "display_name": "Omar Al-Shaheen",
  "bio": "Updated writer bio.",
  "portfolio_link": "https://writer.example.com/omar",
  "profile_photo": "{{profile_photo_path}}",
  "experience_level": "senior",
  "languages": ["Arabic", "English"],
  "editorial_specialties": ["Politics", "Economy"],
  "location": "Riyadh, SA",
  "social_links": {
    "twitter": "https://twitter.com/omar",
    "linkedin": "https://linkedin.com/in/omar"
  },
  "media_affiliation": "Al-Shaheen Media",
  "categories": [1, 2]
}

request.description: Returns path (string) — use as featured_image in article/news JSON body.
List returns featured_image_url per item. Use featured_image_url for .

query.description: ar | en — returns title, content, slug for the requested locale

request.description: Returns article detail in one locale. Use ?locale=ar or ?locale=en.
Download PDF for a published article. locale: ar | en (default ar).

query.description: ar | en — used for download filename

request.description: Downloads the article featured image WITH Al Shaheen watermark. Do NOT use featured_image_url for download — that is the raw image without watermark. Use featured_image_download_url from article API response.

body.raw:
{
  "primary_category_id": 1,
  "status": "draft",

  "title_ar": "كيف يعيد الصحافة المستقلة تشكيل الخطاب العام",
  "subtitle_ar": "نظرة على استقلالية التحرير في العصر الرقمي",
  "slug_ar": "independent-journalism-ar",
  "excerpt_ar": "ملخص المقال باللغة العربية.",
  "content_ar": "المحتوى الكامل للمقال بالعربية. يمكن أن يكون نصاً طويلاً أو JSON من TipTap.",
  "seo_title_ar": "الصحافة المستقلة",
  "seo_description_ar": "وصف SEO بالعربية للمقال.",

  "title_en": "How Independent Journalism Is Reshaping Public Discourse",
  "subtitle_en": "A closer look at editorial independence in the digital age",
  "slug_en": "independent-journalism-en",
  "excerpt_en": "English excerpt for the article.",
  "content_en": "Full article content in English. Can be plain text or TipTap JSON.",
  "seo_title_en": "Independent Journalism",
  "seo_description_en": "English SEO description for the article.",

  "read_time": 8,
  "is_breaking": false,
  "is_premium": false,
  "featured_image": null,
  "writer_notes": "Internal notes for editors",
  "tags": [1, 2],
  "secondary_categories": []
}

request.description: Requires auth (writer, editor, or admin). Send Arabic and English fields in the same request using *_ar and *_en suffixes. status: draft | pending.

body.raw:
{
  "primary_category_id": 1,
  "locale": "ar",
  "title": "مقالة تجريبية",
  "slug": "trial-article-ar",
  "content": "محتوى المقالة بالعربية...",
  "excerpt": "ملخص قصير",
  "status": "draft",
  "is_breaking": false,
  "is_premium": false,
  "tags": [],
  "secondary_categories": []
}

request.description: Legacy format: send title/content with locale (ar|en). Mapped automatically to title_ar or title_en.

body.raw:
{
  "title_ar": "عنوان عربي محدّث",
  "subtitle_ar": "عنوان فرعي محدّث",
  "content_ar": "محتوى عربي محدّث كامل...",
  "excerpt_ar": "ملخص محدّث",
  "seo_title_ar": "SEO محدّث",
  "title_en": "Updated English title",
  "subtitle_en": "Updated English subtitle",
  "content_en": "Updated English full content...",
  "tags": [1, 2],
  "read_time": 10,
  "is_breaking": false,
  "status": "pending"
}

request.description: Update any combination of fields. content accepts plain text or TipTap JSON. tags: [1,2] or slugs or tag_ids. Only sent fields are updated.
Check if AI improvement and translation are available (requires API key in Admin → AI Settings).
Translates Arabic → English (or vice versa). Auto-detects source if omitted. Returns suggestions (title_en, content_en, etc.) for client review — NOT auto-applied. Apply via PUT /articles/{id}.
Translate draft content without saving article first. Target locale is auto-selected (ar→en, en→ar).
Returns published news with featured_image_url ready for display.
All news you created — same shape as GET /writers/me/articles.

query.description: Editors/admins only: list all users drafts

request.description: Same shape as GET /writers/me/drafts but for news. Returns summary + drafts list with readiness, word_count, last_edited_label.
Same shape as GET /writers/me/articles/{id}/preview. Full AR/EN translations for editing.
Increments views_count. Response includes content for the requested locale.
Published news only. Returns PDF in the requested language.
Related published news: same category, sibling categories, and breaking items when applicable.
Trending news categories by views (topics). Scoped to the news item category family when available.
Step 1: Upload image file. Copy data.path into featured_image (string) when creating/updating news.

body.raw:
{
  "category_id": 1,
  "status": "draft",
  "featured_image": "{{featured_image_path}}",
  "tags": [1, 2],

  "title_ar": "عنوان الخبر بالعربية",
  "subtitle_ar": "عنوان فرعي",
  "slug_ar": "news-ar-1",
  "excerpt_ar": "ملخص الخبر بالعربية.",
  "content_ar": "محتوى الخبر الكامل بالعربية...",
  "seo_title_ar": "SEO عربي",
  "seo_description_ar": "وصف SEO بالعربية",

  "title_en": "English news headline",
  "subtitle_en": "English subtitle",
  "slug_en": "news-en-1",
  "excerpt_en": "English excerpt.",
  "content_en": "Full English news content...",
  "seo_title_en": "English SEO title",
  "seo_description_en": "English SEO description",

  "read_time": 5,
  "is_breaking": false,
  "is_premium": false
}

request.description: Step 2: Send featured_image as string path from upload response (e.g. uploads/news/uuid.webp). Run Upload News Image first.

body.raw:
{
  "title_ar": "عنوان محدّث",
  "subtitle_ar": "عنوان فرعي محدّث",
  "content_ar": "محتوى محدّث كامل...",
  "excerpt_ar": "ملخص محدّث",
  "seo_title_ar": "SEO محدّث",
  "title_en": "Updated headline",
  "subtitle_en": "Updated subtitle",
  "content_en": "Updated full content...",
  "excerpt_en": "Updated excerpt",
  "tags": [1, 2],
  "featured_image": "{{featured_image_path}}",
  "read_time": 8,
  "is_breaking": true,
  "status": "published"
}

request.description: Update any combination of fields. content accepts plain text or TipTap JSON object. tags: array of ids, slugs, or [{id:1}]. Also accepts tag_ids.
Admin can delete any item. Writers/contributors can delete their own news only.
Counts: saved_articles_count, following_count, followers_count (writer only).
Toggle save. Response: `saved` (bool), `action` (`saved` | `unsaved`).
Toggle follow. Response: `following` (bool), `action` (`followed` | `unfollowed`).

query.description: Optional secondary category ID under this primary
Optional secondary category ID under this primary
Optional secondary category ID under this primary

request.description: Lists courses the authenticated user is enrolled in with progress summary.
Marks a lesson complete. Returns the updated lesson, full course progress (course, summary, lessons), and all enrolled courses (my_courses). Auto-enrolls if not already enrolled.
Enroll the authenticated user in a course (by id or slug).
Returns enrollment status, completion summary, and per-lesson progress.

query.description: leaderboard | hero | in_feed | mid_article | right_rail | footer

request.description: Call when the ad is displayed to the user. Returns updated views_count and clicks_count.
Call when the user clicks the ad link.

}

request.description: Public contact form. No auth required. Optional Bearer token links message to logged-in user.
Top 3 writers by total article views. Optional category filter.
Public list of users following this writer (writer profile page).
All news you created for the dashboard. Same shape as My Articles.
Article-style drafts list for news (summary + drafts with readiness).
Writer-only alias of PUT /auth/profile. Returns full user object (UserResource) with role profile. Same fields as Auth → Update Profile (Writer).
